String2: I'll explain how I differentiate the different regions I can support on my website.
String3: Given the number of regions in the world and my limited resources, I felt it was necessary to explain how I differentiate and work with regions on the website. It's not just about different currencies; each region offers games restricted to certain countries, and that can cause serious problems with your purchases.
String4: These are the regions I currently support on the web:
String6: Europe. Using Spain as a reference country, I get the prices in Euros, and the games I show you have no regional restrictions in all European Union countries except Germany, where their absurd restrictions on video games can affect games.
String8: United States. I'll show you the games priced in US dollars and the games that can be played there without regional restrictions. I cannot guarantee that the games will work in nearby countries like Mexico or Canada.
String10: Unfortunately, I can't offer you all the deals from every store in every region. The main reason is a lack of communication with the stores, so the best I can do is show you a table with the regions where I'm able to read their deals.
